sections.paragraph:
Original: דּלּה

Transliteration: dallâh

Phonetic: dal-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. hair, threads, thrum (threads of warp hanging in loom)
  2. poor (usually collective of helpless people)
  3. (TWOT) poorest, lowest

Origin: from H1802

TWOT entry: 433c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
